de.uka.ilkd.key.proof

Class SVInstantiationExceptionWithPosition

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.lang.Throwable
      • java.lang.Exception
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.SVInstantiationException
          • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.SVInstantiationExceptionWithPosition
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    HasLocation, java.io.Serializable
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    MissingInstantiationException, MissingSortException, SortMismatchException, SVInstantiationParserException, SVRigidnessException

    public abstract class SVInstantiationExceptionWithPosition
extends SVInstantiationException
implements HasLocation
    Represents an exception with position information. The row position is absolut this means, if in a table it is the row of the table, but the column position is relative to the text and does not describe the column of the table. (has to be changed)
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

        @Nullable
public Location getLocation()
                               throws java.net.MalformedURLException
        Description copied from interface: HasLocation
        This method can be used to obtain the Location (1-based line and column!) of the exception.
        Specified by:
        getLocation in interface HasLocation
        Returns:
        the location of the exception
        Throws:
        java.net.MalformedURLException - if the URL for the location can not be created
